name: nox-mem-archive
description: A2 — Export/Import archive primitives (T1-T9): TAR.gz format + manifest + serializers (chunks/embeddings/KG/ops_audit) + AES-256-GCM encryption + schema migration. Encrypt-by-default per D41 #2.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node --test dist/src/lib/archive/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/cli/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/api/__tests__/*.test.js dist/src/mcp/__tests__/*.test.js
scripts.bench: npm run build && node dist/benchmark/export-import-bench.js > bench-results.json 2> bench-progress.log && cat bench-results.json
